name: save_screenshots
description: Export screenshots for multiple nodes and save them to the local filesystem. Returns metadata only (no base64).

format.description: Default export format: PNG (default), SVG, JPG, or PDF

items.description: List of {nodeId, outputPath, format?, scale?} objects

format.description: Export format: PNG, SVG, JPG, or PDF

nodeId.description: Node ID in colon format e.g. '4029:12345'

outputPath.description: File path to write the image to

scale.description: Default export scale for raster formats (default 2)
